title: Manage locations
excerpt: Group and manage your readers by physical location. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Dashboard](https://docs.stripe.com/terminal/fleet/locations-and-zones.md?dashboard-or-api=dashboard) - [API](https://docs.stripe.com/terminal/fleet/locations-and-zones.md?dashboard-or-api=api)
